name: claude-architecture-mapper
description: Scans agents, skills, commands, rules, and memories across your Claude Code environment, then writes a structured ARCHITECTURE.md with Mermaid dependency graphs, collision reports, and ecosystem health scores.

metadata.description: Scans agents, skills, commands, rules, and memories across your Claude Code environment, then writes a structured ARCHITECTURE.md with Mermaid dependency graphs, collision reports, and ecosystem health scores.

plugins.name: architecture-mapper
plugins.description: Scans your Claude Code plugin ecosystem and generates an ARCHITECTURE.md with Mermaid.js dependency graphs, collision reports, and ecosystem health scores.
